SEARCH
Package com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item

Class Tool

java.lang.Object
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item.Item
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item.DurableItem
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item.Tool
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
Direct Known Subclasses:
DragonfangBlade, DwarvenPickaxe
public abstract class Tool extends DurableItem
Abstract base class for custom tools, inheriting from DurableItem.

Provides common properties and methods for all custom tools, such as ID, name, material, and stack size.

Handles giving, item retrieval, and item identification, allowing subclasses to define specific behaviors and attributes.

  • Constructor Details

    • Tool

      public Tool(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, ToolType toolType, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, tooltype, and name.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      toolType - The type of tool this item represents. These can be found in ToolType
      name - The custom name to display for this item

    • Tool

      public Tool(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, ToolType toolType, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, int durability)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, tooltype, name, and durability.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      toolType - The type of tool this item represents. These can be found in ToolType
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      durability - The custom Item's custom durability

    • Tool

      public Tool(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, ToolType toolType, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor, int durability)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, tooltype, name, flavor text, and durability.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      toolType - The type of tool this item represents. These can be found in ToolType
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      durability - The custom Item's custom durability

    • Tool

      public Tool(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, ToolType toolType, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor, List<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component> otherLore, int durability)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, tooltype, name, flavor text, lore, and durability.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      toolType - The type of tool this item represents. These can be found in ToolType
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      otherLore - The other lore lines to display for this item, excluding the flavor text
      durability - The custom Item's custom durability

    • Tool

      public Tool(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, String id, ToolType toolType, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component name, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component flavor, List<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component> otherLore, int durability, float cmd)
      Creates a new Tool with the given plugin, ID, material, name, flavor text, other lore, stack size, and custom model data.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The JavaPlugin instance for this item
      id - A unique string identifier for this item type
      toolType - The type of tool this item represents. These can be found in ToolType
      name - The custom name to display for this item
      flavor - The flavor text to display for this item as the first line of lore
      otherLore - The other lore lines to display for this item, excluding the flavor text
      durability - The custom Item's custom durability
      cmd - The custom model data to display for this item, determining its appearance

  • Method Details

    • getItem

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getItem()
      Gets the ItemStack representation of this item, including its material, name, lore, custom model data, and persistent data container for identification.
      Overrides:
      getItem in class Item
      Returns:
      The ItemStack representation of this item

    • getItem

      @Deprecated(since="always", forRemoval=false) public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getItem(int amount)
      Deprecated.
      Use getItem() instead
      Not supported for tools.
      Overrides:
      getItem in class Item
      Parameters:
      amount - The amount of the item to get, which should not exceed the maximum stack size for this item type
      Returns:
      The ItemStack representation of this item with the specified amount
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - always

    • applyAttributes

      protected abstract void applyAttributes(org.bukkit.inventory.meta.ItemMeta meta)
      Should be overridden by inheriters. Applies attributes to a given item.
      Parameters:
      meta - The meta for the item that attributes are being applied to
